organization.title: Branding
organization.identityDescription: Shown in the sidebar instead of the platform branding. Leave the display name empty to use the platform default.
organization.faviconHint: Square format (1:1), PNG or JPEG, max 512 KB
organization.faviconDropzoneTitle: Upload a logo or drag one here
organization.invalidFile: Invalid file. Please upload a square PNG or JPEG image under 512 KB.
organization.errorFileType: Wrong file type. Please choose a PNG or JPEG image.
organization.errorFileSize: File is too large. Maximum size is 512 KB.
organization.errorNotSquare: Image is not square. Please upload a 1:1 image so it stays sharp at small sizes.
organization.colorDescription: Used for buttons, links, and highlights throughout the app.
organization.colorContrastFail: Hard to read — try a darker or lighter shade
organization.previewDescription: How your branding appears in the app.
organization.errorInsufficientContrast: This color doesn't have enough contrast against text. Try a darker or lighter shade.
organization.errorInvalidColor: That doesn't look like a valid color. Please enter a 6-digit hex.
